kinesisanalytics.application.inputlambda.Docs: The ARN of the [AWS Lambda](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/lambda/) function that operates on records in the stream.  To specify an earlier version of the Lambda function than the latest, include the Lambda function version in the Lambda function ARN. For more information about Lambda ARNs, see [Example ARNs: AWS Lambda](/general/latest/gr/aws-arns-and-namespaces.html#arn-syntax-lambda)
The ARN of the IAM role that is used to access the AWS Lambda function.
